$comment: Aperture Tauri v2 shell config (doc 11 §2, doc 02 §2). [VERIFY] every field against the pinned Tauri 2.x schema at build time — schema URL below drives IDE validation.

build.$comment: The UI agent owns ../ui (Vite + the BubbleSpec/event-channel client). The shell only hosts it.

app.$comment: ONE overlay window in v1 (primary monitor); main.rs clones it per-monitor at setup (doc 11 §2, multi-monitor at M8). Transparent + undecorated + always-on-top + taskbar-skipped + no shadow = a glass overlay, never a chrome window.

security.$comment: csp null in dev; tightened at M9. capabilities default scopes the overlay window to core permissions only — no network/shell plugin permissions ever land here (the two-emitter gate lives in the gateway crate, doc 13 §2).

bundle.$comment: externalBin embeds the two GPU sidecars; orchestration spawns/kills them (doc 02 §2, doc 12 §5). Tauri appends the target triple to each path at build time. active/icon are placeholders for M0.
